ability_checks.auto_success: Tasks within normal capability with proper tools/time
ability_checks.auto_failure: Impossible tasks or lacking required resources
ability_checks.when_to_roll: Only when outcome is uncertain and failure has consequences

skill_checks.trained_bonus: Add skill modifier to relevant ability check
skill_checks.disadvantage: Roll 2d20, take lower (when hindered or impaired)

saving_throws.when_used: Resist effects, avoid hazards, endure conditions

death_saves.note: OSR style - 0 HP = death (unless house rule enabled)

initiative.optional_rule: Roll 1d20 + DEX modifier for initiative order

attack_roll.success: Roll meets or exceeds target's AC

critical_hit.effect: Roll damage dice twice, add modifier once

healing.rest: Short rest: spend hit dice, Long rest: full HP

hit_points.temporary_hp: Absorbed first, doesn't stack, doesn't heal

armor_class.calculation: Base 10 + armor bonus + DEX modifier (max +2 for heavy armor)

conditions.poisoned: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks
conditions.blessed: +1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws
conditions.stunned: Cannot move or take actions, auto-fail STR and DEX saves

combat_actions.action: Attack, cast spell, dash, disengage, dodge, help, hide, ready, search, use item
combat_actions.bonus_action: Some class features, two-weapon fighting, special abilities
combat_actions.movement: Can move up to speed, split before/after action
combat_actions.free_actions: Drop item, speak briefly, interact with object

leveling_up.new_abilities: Gain class features per class progression
leveling_up.ability_score_increase: Every 4 levels, +2 to one stat or +1 to two stats (max 20)

light_sources.lantern: 30ft bright, 30ft dim, lasts 6 hours with oil

traps.detection: Passive Perception or active Investigation check
traps.disarming: Thieves' tools + DEX check, failure may trigger trap

doors.locked: Thieves' tools + DEX check or break (STR check)
doors.listening: Perception check to hear through door

encumbrance.heavily_encumbered: Speed reduced by 10ft, disadvantage on STR/DEX/CON checks

short_rest.benefits: Spend hit dice to heal, recover some abilities

long_rest.benefits: Restore all HP, half of total hit dice, all abilities

consumables.spell_components: Track costly components, ignore common ones

persuasion.modifiers: Offer something valuable (+2 to +5), threaten (-2 to -5)

intimidation.consequences: Success doesn't mean loyalty - may betray later

death_saves.description: At 0 HP, make death saves instead of dying. 3 successes = stabilized, 3 failures = dead

flanking.description: Attacking from opposite sides grants advantage

critical_fumbles.description: Natural 1 on attack causes mishap (drop weapon, hit ally, etc.)

morale.description: NPCs/monsters may flee when reduced to 50% numbers or when leader falls

deadly.description: True OSR - death is permanent, resources matter
